{{Infobox artifact
| name = Sword of Makiel
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Sword of Makiel]] has purple energy pulsing through its blade in veins.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Sword of Makiel]] is a two-handed [[sword]] that radiates contempt for [[Ozriel]] and has strikes that are absolute, hitting multiple possibilities at once.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22">''Waybound'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Sword of Makiel]] drifted in the vacuum after [[Ozriel]] vanished.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29">''Waybound'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
